title: euphrasia nemorosa var. tetraquetra
intro: Euphrasia nemorosa var. tetraquetra, also known as a type of Mountain Eyebright, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, digestive issues, and eye infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Euphrasia nemorosa var. tetraquetra can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
